title: Create: FQQD's Create 2
description:
Deprecated!
A modpack centered around the Create Mod V6, including the best available addons and performance mod.
body:
## Since Season 2 ended, this modpack is deprecated.

![FQQD's Create Modpack 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/425cdc08b4f96e53319f7cec7402eb85a03fe267.png)

# FQQD's Create Server - Season 2

### Enjoy. Play. Create!

The modpack for the second season of FQQD's Create server, featuring the long awaited Create 6.0.4 update. If you have suggestions, feel free to let me know.

This modpack is mainly meant for a private server that me and friends play on, but the public can enjoy it as well! :D


<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>

## Mods:

### Create
![Create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LNytGWDc/61d716699bcf1ec42ed4926a9e1c7311be6087e2_96.webp) [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create/) - Aesthetic Technology that empowers the Player

### Create Addons
![Create: Bells & Whistles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56e8d7be0a97a1535f2ece00b9a45c6e43a6c30b.webp) [Create: Bells & Whistles](https://modrinth.com/mod/bellsandwhistles/) - Additions and adornments for the modern Create engineer. Available for both Fabric & Forge!

![Create: Easy Structures ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/753202247fc77ffc5a00c5fe0b5764c2887cadc6.webp) [Create: Easy Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-easy-structures) - A mod that adds some structures to Minecraft which have Create mod blocks included.

![Create: Better Villagers Create: Better Villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e72655fd8aac210ff8bfe94fa072e158aac5ca3_0.webp) [Create: Better Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-better-villagers/) - Mod that adds a host of Create-mod villager professions

![Create Contraption Terminals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07f6bac8b2d7473b4027c769ea79a7ca7cc19761_0.webp) [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage/) & [Create Contraption Terminals](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-contraption-terminals/) - Better Storage Access, i.e. for vaults

![Create: Ultimate Factory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7537f0e4cad9cd35ad3b7a2d58f096a50e11f598_0.webp) [Create: Ultimate Factory](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ultimate-factory/) - An addon for the Create mod developed to increase automation possibilities, adding 20+ carefully balanced recipes to the game.

![Create: Misc and Things](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c917cda4d9319340724b9c5ca7460f56dd79dcd.webp) [Create: Misc and Things](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-misc-and-things) - Add useful and fun things to Create

![Create: SpawnerBoxer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09eb440cc5dd943a59410869759be27e239a2411_0.webp) [Create: SpawnerBoxer](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-spawnerboxer/) - Deployers from Create mod can now activate spawners!

![Create: Pattern Schematics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45fadbf7be153417d364ccb4e420ca9d5a2bd94b_0.webp) [Create: Pattern Schematics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-pattern-schematics/) - Build with repeating schematics!

![Create: Sound of Steam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yGttHo06/5d27ba26f08650eb0ede6a42c620cdc34cc43d08_96.webp) [Create: Sound of Steam](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-sound-of-steam) - A Create addon that adds pipe organs!

![Create: Deep Dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/knrLSB8n/c97b518288c062505f2b49de2e8646693032b6a5_96.webp) [Create: Deep Dark](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deep-dark/) - A Create mod addon featuring new end-game items based on the Deep Dark biome, making venturing into Warden territory more fun and rewarding.

![Create: Winery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zBuk6egG/55e89efe6930dad51fbc6a5d0c91b33bf38fc363_96.webp) [Create: Winery](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-winery) - Build your own winery with Create.

![Create: Cheese Factory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mdJuXlKN/bcfbe3599d02653adeb1f4f3a824f8e6983ad263_96.webp) [Create: Cheese Factory](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-cheese) - Build your own cheese factory with Create.

![Create: Let The Adventure Begin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fUa6OtBG/49089716b624e50307da0d7a23d019d300682e40.gif) [Create: Let The Adventure Begin](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-let-the-adventure-begin/) - 
Adds Structures 62 unique structures, New Loot, a chance to fish create mod items and much more

![Storage Drawers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/guitPqEi/58b4229c52876eff66c9f98a5d2a1e9b9f648501.png) [Storage Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/storagedrawers/) - Interactive bulk storage solution

![Create: Trading floor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WROfLLvn/4573807702d15fb8529af62a393c85fd5b62b486_96.webp) [Create: Trading floor](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-trading-floor) - Automate trading with villagers using create!

![Create: Garnished](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6e2SlzR4/e207828b7d61b9db8e318278ac4883f8a418a9c9_96.webp) [Create: Garnished](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-garnished) - A Create Mod Addon that adds different food items, mainly nuts.

![Create: Mechanical Chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EoG8jJjT/c512bc421a3999fcf8eb69020d7a302add948815_96.webp) [Create: Mechanical Chicken](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-mechanical-chicken) - Egg generator addon for create

![Create: Cardboarded Convenience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dWU6xUnj/06baccaf9a4c8f91e63b5b3ece48f8b82c5ca29a_96.webp) [Create: Cardboarded Convenience](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-cardboarded-conveynience) - A small tweak allowing players to be disguised as packages even on chain conveyor. Extra chain conveyor related features may come in the future.

![Create Sifting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r018adCw/8d8d69c35328880f9397d0c03dd2672e4d6e9c90_96.webp) [Create Sifting](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-sifting) - A sifter block for the amazing Create mod

![Create Mechanical Extruder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hGAlcCDJ/2fb5525264ca2afccf43e64543f44063685d8013_96.webp) [Create Mechanical Extruder](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-mechanical-extruder) - A mechanical extruder block. Can be used to generate any block or item from adjacent blocks/fluids.

![Create: Vibrant Vaults](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hddN8ksR/105d3ab0a1f101ba6b34685501d6df6bb4ab5fa4_96.webp) [Create: Vibrant Vaults](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-vibrant-vaults) - A Create mod addon that adds more item vaults.

![Create: Reforged Foundations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Fr6AmYQ2/421f408d41d6ba4889125e4848f704472ea18aee_96.webp) [Create: Reforged Foundations](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-reforged-foundations) - New recipes to obtain most of the blocks and vanilla items in the game.

![Create Crafts & Additions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kU1G12Nn/d8d1ec226747a800ba175f70ad00a80f37047cb6_96.webp) [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition) - Extends Create and acts as a bridge between electricity and kinetic energy

![Create: Enchantment Industry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JWGBpFUP/9571cd419c5eee9f2017f0b6f7cf6e81c665723b_96.webp) [Create: Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry) - Automatic Enchanting, with Create

![Create: Ironworks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FZb6dmQf/61a779b01ec6dbe3fc7b2f0683bbcdce1de2fd44_96.webp) [Create: Ironworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ironworks) - An addon for the Create mod bringing new materials (Tin, Bronze, Steel) and related items.

![Create Stuff 'N Additions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aq9qUUQG/5bdb5c6598670bae17d6295757066d43c7364d61_96.webp) [Create Stuff 'N Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-stuff-additions) - Dominate your environment with Create technology

### Quality of life and other fun

- [Visual Workbench](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-workbench/) - Items stay inside of crafting tables and are also rendered on top. It's really fancy!
- [Easy Anvils](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils) - Be ready for overhauled anvils! Items stay, better name tags, many tweaks!
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports/) - Makes chat unreportable (where possible)
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin/) - Food/hunger-related HUD improvements
- [Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer/) - Zoom mod that is powerful, lean, and pretty customizable. The zoom is yours!
- [Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic/) - Enchanting tables as they always should have been! Items stay after closing, and easy re-rolls.
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered/) - A Minecraft mod that provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks.
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/) - View Items and Recipes
- [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements/) - Better Advancements tries to improve the UI and UX for the advancements system in minecraft 1.12+ in a modded environment
- [FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) - Break down your trees by only cutting one piece of it
- [GammaJustExtremeBright](https://modrinth.com/mod/gjeb/) - This mod allows you to change your gamma value up to 1000% ingame. (FullBright)
- [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam/) - A highly customizable freecam mod.
- [Easy Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-shulker-boxes) - Supercharge shulkes boxes, bundles and backpacks! Fully useable in your inventory with many intuitive interactions.
- [Better Days](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterdays) - A Minecraft 1.19+ mod to designed to extend the length of the crazy short minecraft day.
- [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next/) - Take control over you inventory. Sort. Move matching Items. Throw all. Locked slots. Gear sets! And much more.
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling/) - Adds a search bar to the Key-Bindings menu
- [Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dynamic-torches) - Adds dynamic lights for players, items, mobs, etc.
- [Dark Mode Everywhere](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-mode-everywhere/) - Have dark GUIs everywhere with the power of shaders
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations/) - Bringing first-person animations to the third-person
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks/) - Enhances inventory management by adding various functions to the mouse buttons.
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map/) & [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap/)
- [Creeper Firework](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-firework) - Creepers explode harmlessly and beautifully
- [Chunk Loaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunk-loaders) - Chunk Loaders allows you keep chunks loaded with different tiers of chunk loaders!
- [BoccHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/bocchud) - MiniHUD unofficial forge port. A tiny client-side mod for Minecraft. that adds the coordinates, looking angle and current speed to the screen.
- [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) - Every block deserves a friend.

### Curios API

![Curios API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5beaeed5434cc65ea5c67502df45af6709133d29.webp) [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios/version/) - A flexible and expandable accessory/equipment API for users and developers.
- [Elytra Slot](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-slot) - Adds accessory support to the elytra so you can fly and wear chest armor at the same time.
- [Create: Curios Jetpack & Backtank](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-curios-jetpack) - Use Create jetpack and backtanks in Curios/Trinkets back slot.

### Performance and Graphical Mods
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium/) - No-compromises game logic optimization mod. Well suited for clients and servers of all kinds. Now available for Fabric and NeoForge!
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options/) - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra/) - A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris/) - A modern shader pack loader for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures/) - Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities in resourcepacks just like Optifine but for Fabric
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/) - EMF is an, OptiFine format, Custom Entity Model replacement mod available for Fabric and Forge.
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling/) - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/) - The fastest and most compatible rendering optimization mod for Minecraft. Now available for both NeoForge and Fabric!
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures
- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps/) - Clumps XP orbs together to reduce lag
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix/) - All-in-one mod that improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs. Compatible with all your favorite performance mods!
- [Observable](https://modrinth.com/mod/observable) - See what's lagging your server.

</details>
